meta.description: UI/UX Developer (Angular Developer) — modern Angular portfolio with premium UI and animations.

person.name: Rajeev Kurmi
person.headline: UI/UX Developer (Angular Developer)
person.summary: Passionate frontend developer building modern, scalable and animated UI experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: UI/UX-focused Angular developer building dashboard-grade applications.
about.description: I craft premium, accessible web experiences using Angular, scalable architecture, and a product-first UI/UX mindset. I specialize in building dashboard-style applications including ITSM systems, data-heavy UIs, and reusable component-based architectures.

experience.title: UI/UX Developer
highlights: Built ITSM-style dashboard for telecom site rollout tracking
Developed reusable Angular components (tooltip, menus, status pills)
Used ag-Grid for large dataset visualization
Integrated REST APIs for real-time updates
Designed KPI cards, filters, and dashboard UI

experience.title: B.Tech CSE
experience.company: Babulal Tarabai Institute of Research and Technology

projects.title: ITSM Dashboard
projects.description: Dashboard for incident/task tracking with KPI cards, filters, ag-Grid, and real-time API integration.

projects.title: Site Rollout Dashboard
projects.description: Telecom dashboard with charts and tables for site rollout tracking and performance insights.

projects.title: E-commerce Website
projects.description: E-commerce experience with product listing, cart, and checkout flow.

projects.title: Document Management System
projects.description: Role-based document system with secure access and organized workflows.

contact.title: Contact Me!
